chunks.title: Solomon's Decision and Workforce
chunks.reason: Introduces the project and initial mobilization of laborers.

chunks.title: Solomon's Letter to Huram
chunks.reason: Contains Solomon's request for materials and skilled workers.

chunks.title: Huram's Reply to Solomon
chunks.reason: Records the king of Tyre's response and agreement.

chunks.title: Final Census and Assignment
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with the final count and distribution of workers.
